title: Pre-Employment Offenses
content:
1. Submission, furnishing, or using false information or documents or any form of misrepresentation for the purpose of job application or employment.
2. Unjust refusal to join ship after all employment and travel documents have been duly approved by the appropriate government agencies.

metadata.source_file: 2003 POEA Rules on Overseas Employment of Seafarers.pdf
